author: Unjust
text:
Commit absorbed plugin config after symlink, not before

state_repo::ensure ran seed() before ensure_plugins_symlink, so a legacy .balls/plugins/*.json absorbed during in-place migration landed on disk but never on the tracker branch. The files worked locally through the new symlink but were never pushed and a fresh clone did not inherit them; self-healed only when the next bl plugin admin operation triggered a blanket git_add_all.

Defer the seed commit until after the plugins and project.json symlink steps so an absorbed plugins dir is captured in the same balls: seed state branch commit. Regression test mirrors the bl-dc2b verification: a legacy .balls/plugins/github.json must be reachable from HEAD with no uncommitted residue.
